org.docgene.model.globals

Class ArticlesModel

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesModel

  • public class ArticlesModel
extends java.lang.Object
    Represents the root for the model.

      Set if if the parser accept identical title IDs(default is true).

      Clear the content of the model.
      int countArticles()
      Return the count of all articles, excluding the XMLRedirect and template articles.
      void forceAbsoluteLinks(boolean value)
      Set if relative links to files on the file system outside of the wiki will be converted to absolute links (default is false).
      java.util.List<org.docgene.model.Article> getAllArticles()
      Return all the articles including those from the packages.
      java.util.List<org.docgene.model.globals.ImageDefinition> getAllImages()
      Return all the images including those from the packages.

      Return all the infobox definitions including those from the packages.

      Return all the resources including those from the packages.

      Return an article specified by its reference.

      Return an article specified by its reference.

      Return an article specified by its reference.

      Return the articles without packages.

      Return the map from input file to article.

      Return an iterator on all the articles, including packages.

      Return the Map of articles for each name, for all packages.
      java.util.Map<org.docgene.model.ArticleRef,org.docgene.model.Article> getArticlesMapByRef()
      Return the Map of articles for each article reference, for all packages.

      Return the articles without packages.

      Return the categories.

      Return the category with a specified ID.

      boolean hasArticle(java.lang.String refID)
      Return true if the model contains an article with no package which can be reached through a specified reference.
      boolean hasArticle(java.lang.String refID, java.lang.String origPack, java.lang.String pack)
      Return true if the model contains an article which can be reached through a specified reference.
      boolean hasArticleFromAnyPackage(java.lang.String refID)
      Return true if the model contains an article with no package which can be reached through a specified reference, from any package.
      boolean hasCategory(java.lang.String catID)
      Return true if the model has a category with a specified ID.
      boolean hasComments()
      Return true if there are comments.
      boolean hasCustomGlossaryMenuItem(boolean isIndex)
      Return true if there is a custom glossary menu item.
      boolean hasDictionaryFile()
      Return true if there is a dictionary File.
      boolean hasDisambArticle(org.docgene.model.ArticleRef ref)
      Return true if there is a disambiguation article corresponding to an article reference.
      boolean hasDisambArticle(java.lang.String desc)
      Return true if the model has a disambiguation article for a specified description.
      boolean hasFallbackArticle(char type)
      Return a fallback article.
      boolean hasFullTextSearch()
      Return true if the model has full text Search.
      boolean hasGenerationByDelta()
      Return the generation mode.
      boolean hasGlobalIndex()
      Return true if there is a global index.
      boolean hasGlossary()
      Return true if the articles have a glossary.
      boolean hasImage(java.lang.String id)
      Return true if the model has an image with no package of a specified ID.
      boolean hasImage(java.lang.String id, java.lang.String origPack, java.lang.String pack)
      Return true if the model has an image for a specified id and package.
      boolean hasImageForAllPackages(java.lang.String id)
      Return true if the model has an image for a specified id (for all packages).
      boolean hasImages()
      Return true if the model has images.
      boolean hasIndex()
      Return true if the model has already an index article.
      boolean hasInfobox(java.lang.String id)
      Return true if there is an infobox definition of a specified ID.
      boolean hasInfobox(java.lang.String id, java.lang.String origPack, java.lang.String pack)
      Return true if the model has an infobox definition for a specified id and package.
      boolean hasLinksFrom()
      Return true if the articles must have a "What Links Here" link.
      boolean hasPackage(java.lang.String pack)
      Return true if a package exists.
      boolean hasPackages()
      Return true if there are packages.
      boolean hasPageRanks()
      Return true if there are computed PageRanks.
      boolean hasRawArticles()
      Return true if this model has at least one raw HTML file.
      boolean hasResource(java.lang.String id)
      Return true if the model has a resource with no package of a specified ID.
      boolean hasResource(java.lang.String id, java.lang.String origPack, java.lang.String pack)
      Return true if the model has a resource for a specified id and package.
      boolean hasTitles()
      Return true if at least one article has a searchable title.
      boolean hasTransitiveArticle(java.lang.String refID, java.lang.String origPack, java.lang.String pack)
      Return true if the model has a concrete article for a specified id and package.
      boolean hasTransitiveArticle(java.lang.String refID, java.lang.String origPack, java.lang.String pack, boolean acceptInclude)
      Return true if the model has a concrete article for a specified id and package.
      boolean isAllowingIdenticalTitleIDs()
      Return true if if the parser accept identical title IDs (default is true).
      boolean isConcurrent()
      Return true for concurrent parsing.
      boolean isForcingAbsoluteLinks()
      Return if relative links to files on the file system outside of the wiki will be converted to absolute links (default is false).
      boolean isIncludingElement(org.docgene.model.globals.PackagedElement element)
      Return true if an element must be included in the wiki output.
      boolean isIncludingPackage(java.lang.String pack)
      Return true if a package must be included in the wiki output.
      boolean isStoringResources()
      Return true if resources must be stored.
      boolean isSupportingThemes()
      Return true if the model writer support themes.
      boolean isWritingAnyScripts()
      Return true if allowing to write any scripts.
      boolean isWritingArticlesHeaderFrame()
      Return true if articles header frame must be written (default is true).
      boolean isWritingArticlesTOC()
      Return true if articles Table of content must be written (default is true)
      boolean isWritingResources()
      Return true if allowing to write resources files.
      boolean isWritingScripts()
      Return true if allowing to write scripts.
      boolean isWritingSeeAlso()
      Return true if allowing to write the seeAlso elements(default is true).
      boolean isWritingSubDirectories()
      Return true if allowing to write articles, resources and images in sub-directories (default is true).

      Integrate the categories of an article in the list of categories.

      Setup element definitions to be sure that we don't have more than once the same path name.

      Return true if errors on an element must be emitted.
      boolean showPackageErrors(java.lang.String pack)
      Return true if a package must be included in the wiki output.
      boolean showUnresolvedImages(java.lang.String origPack, java.lang.String destPack)
      Return true if unresolved images between between two packages must emit an error.
      boolean showUnresolvedInfoboxes(java.lang.String origPack, java.lang.String destPack)
      Return true if unresolved infoboxes between between two packages must emit an error.
      boolean showUnresolvedReferences(java.lang.String origPack, java.lang.String destPack)
      Return true if unresolved references between between two packages must emit an error.
      void supportThemes(boolean supportThemes)
      Set if the model writer support themes.
      void writeAnyScripts(boolean isWriting)
      Set if allowing to write any scripts (default is true).
      void writeArticlesHeaderFrame(boolean value)
      Set if articles header frame must be written (default is true).
      void writeArticlesTOC(boolean value)
      Set if articles Table of content must be written (default is true).
      void writeResources(boolean value)
      Set if allowing to write resources files (default is true).
      void writeScripts(boolean isWriting)
      Set if allowing to write scripts (default is true).
      void writeSeeAlso(boolean value)
      Set if allowing to write the seeAlso elements (default is true).
      void writeSubDirectories(boolean value)
      Set if allowing to write articles, resources and images in sub-directories (default is true).

    • Constructor Detail

      • ArticlesModel

        public ArticlesModel()
        Constructor.

      • ArticlesModel

        public ArticlesModel(boolean isConcurrent)
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        isConcurrent - true for concurrent parsing

      • ArticlesModel

        public ArticlesModel(boolean isConcurrent,
                     boolean storeResources)
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        isConcurrent - true for concurrent parsing
        storeResources - true if resources should be stored in the model (this concerns images and resources definition files)

        Set if allowing to write the seeAlso elements (default is true).
        Parameters:
        value - true if allowing to write the seeAlso elements

      • isWritingSeeAlso

        public boolean isWritingSeeAlso()
        Return true if allowing to write the seeAlso elements(default is true).
        Returns:
        true if allowing to write the seeAlso elements

      • writeResources

        public void writeResources(boolean value)
        Set if allowing to write resources files (default is true).
        Parameters:
        value - true if allowing to write resources files

      • isWritingResources

        public boolean isWritingResources()
        Return true if allowing to write resources files.
        Returns:
        true if allowing to write resources files

      • writeScripts

        public void writeScripts(boolean isWriting)
        Set if allowing to write scripts (default is true).
        Parameters:
        isWriting - true if allowing to write scripts

      • isWritingScripts

        public boolean isWritingScripts()
        Return true if allowing to write scripts.
        Returns:
        true if allowing to write scripts

      • writeAnyScripts

        public void writeAnyScripts(boolean isWriting)
        Set if allowing to write any scripts (default is true).
        Parameters:
        isWriting - true if allowing to write any scripts

      • isWritingAnyScripts

        public boolean isWritingAnyScripts()
        Return true if allowing to write any scripts.
        Returns:
        true if allowing to write any scripts

      • forceAbsoluteLinks

        public void forceAbsoluteLinks(boolean value)
        Set if relative links to files on the file system outside of the wiki will be converted to absolute links (default is false).
        Parameters:
        value - true if relative links to files on the file system outside of the wiki will be converted to absolute links

      • isForcingAbsoluteLinks

        public boolean isForcingAbsoluteLinks()
        Return if relative links to files on the file system outside of the wiki will be converted to absolute links (default is false).
        Returns:
        true if relative links to files on the file system outside of the wiki will be converted to absolute links

      • supportThemes

        public void supportThemes(boolean supportThemes)
        Set if the model writer support themes.
        Parameters:
        supportThemes - true if the model writer support themes

      • isSupportingThemes

        public boolean isSupportingThemes()
        Return true if the model writer support themes.
        Returns:
        true if the model writer support themes

      • setFulltextSearch

        public void setFulltextSearch(org.docgene.model.globals.FullTextSearch fullTextSearch)
        Set the full text search manager.
        Parameters:
        fullTextSearch - the full text search manager

      • addLinksFrom

        public void addLinksFrom()
        Set if the articles must have a "What Links Here" link.

      • hasLinksFrom

        public boolean hasLinksFrom()
        Return true if the articles must have a "What Links Here" link.
        Returns:
        true if the articles must have a "What Links Here" link

      • addTodo

        public void addTodo(org.docgene.model.XMLArticle article,
                    org.docgene.model.TodoElement todo)
        Add a TODO to the TODO list.
        Parameters:
        article - the article
        todo - the TODO

        public org.docgene.model.XMLTodoList getTodoList()
        Return the TODO list.

        the TODO list

      • addComment

        public void addComment(org.docgene.model.XMLArticle article,
                       org.docgene.model.XMLComment comment)
        Add a comment to the comment list.
        Parameters:
        article - the article
        comment - the comment

      • getCommentList

        public org.docgene.model.XMLCommentList getCommentList()
        Return the comment list.
        Returns:
        the comment list

      • hasComments

        public boolean hasComments()
        Return true if there are comments.
        Returns:
        true if there are comments

      • getDictionary

        Returns:
        true if the model has full text Search

        public org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesGlossary getGlossary()
        Return the articles glossary.

        the glossary

      • hasGlossary

        public boolean hasGlossary()
        Return true if the articles have a glossary.
        Returns:
        true if the articles have a glossary

      • setGlossary

        public void setGlossary(org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesGlossary glossary)
        Set the articles glossary.
        Parameters:
        glossary - the glossary

      • hasImage

        public boolean hasImage(java.lang.String id,
                        java.lang.String origPack,
                        java.lang.String pack)
        Return true if the model has an image for a specified id and package.
        Parameters:
        id - the image ID
        origPack - the origin package (ie it is the package from which the reference is emitted)
        pack - the image package
        Returns:
        true if the model has an image for the specified id and package

      • hasImageForAllPackages

        public boolean hasImageForAllPackages(java.lang.String id)
        Return true if the model has an image for a specified id (for all packages).
        Parameters:
        id - the image ID
        Returns:
        true if the model has an image for the specified id

      • getImageForAllPackages

        public org.docgene.model.globals.ImageDefinition getImageForAllPackages(java.lang.String id)
        Return the image of a specified id (for all packages).
        Parameters:
        id - the image ID
        Returns:
        the image of the specified id

      • getImage

        public org.docgene.model.globals.ImageDefinition getImage(java.lang.String id)
        Return the image of a specified id. The image in this case is not in any package.
        Parameters:
        id - the image ID
        Returns:
        the image

      • getImage

        public org.docgene.model.globals.ImageDefinition getImage(java.lang.String id,
                                                          java.lang.String origPack,
                                                          java.lang.String pack)
        Return the image of a specified id and package.
        Parameters:
        id - the image ID
        origPack - the origin package (ie it is the package from which the reference is emitted)
        pack - the image package
        Returns:
        the image of the specified id and package

      • addImage

        public void addImage(org.docgene.model.globals.ImageDefinition image)
        Add an image resource.
        Parameters:
        image - the image resource

      • removeImage

        public boolean removeImage(org.docgene.model.globals.ImageDefinition image)
        Removes an image.
        Parameters:
        image - the image.
        Returns:
        true if an image was removed

      • getImages

        public java.util.Map<java.lang.String,org.docgene.model.globals.ImageDefinition> getImages()
        Return the image resources.
        Returns:
        the image resources

      • getAllImages

        public java.util.List<org.docgene.model.globals.ImageDefinition> getAllImages()
        Return all the images including those from the packages.
        Returns:
        all the images including those from the packages

      • hasImage

        public boolean hasImage(java.lang.String id)
        Return true if the model has an image with no package of a specified ID.
        Parameters:
        id - the ID
        Returns:
        true if the model has an image with no package of the specified ID

      • addImageFromHRef

        public final void addImageFromHRef()
        Add an image from a path on the model.

      • hasImages

        public boolean hasImages()
        Return true if the model has images.
        Returns:
        true if the model has images.

      • addInfobox

        public void addInfobox(org.docgene.model.globals.InfoboxDefinition infobox)
        Add an infobox definition.
        Parameters:
        infobox - the infobox

      • removeInfobox

        public boolean removeInfobox(org.docgene.model.globals.InfoboxDefinition infobox)
        Removes an infobox definition.
        Parameters:
        infobox - infobox definition.
        Returns:
        true if an image was removed

      • hasInfobox

        public boolean hasInfobox(java.lang.String id)
        Return true if there is an infobox definition of a specified ID.
        Parameters:
        id - the infobox definition ID
        Returns:
        true if there is an infobox definition of the specified ID

      • hasInfobox

        public boolean hasInfobox(java.lang.String id,
                          java.lang.String origPack,
                          java.lang.String pack)
        Return true if the model has an infobox definition for a specified id and package.
        Parameters:
        id - the image ID
        origPack - the origin package (ie it is the package from which the reference is emitted)
        pack - the infobox definition package
        Returns:
        true if the model has an infobox definition for the specified id and package

      • getInfobox

        public org.docgene.model.globals.InfoboxDefinition getInfobox(java.lang.String id)
        Return the infobox definition of a specified id and package. The infobox in this case is not in any package.
        Parameters:
        id - the infobox definition ID
        Returns:
        the infobox definition of the specified id and package

      • getInfobox

        public org.docgene.model.globals.InfoboxDefinition getInfobox(java.lang.String id,
                                                              java.lang.String origPack,
                                                              java.lang.String pack)
        Return the infobox definition of a specified id and package.
        Parameters:
        id - the infobox definition ID
        origPack - the origin package (ie it is the package from which the reference is emitted)
        pack - the infobox definition package
        Returns:
        the infobox definition of the specified id and package

      • getInfoboxes

        public java.util.Map<java.lang.String,org.docgene.model.globals.InfoboxDefinition> getInfoboxes()
        Return the infobox definitions.
        Returns:
        the infobox definitions

      • getAllInfoboxes

        public java.util.List<org.docgene.model.globals.InfoboxDefinition> getAllInfoboxes()
        Return all the infobox definitions including those from the packages.
        Returns:
        all the infobox definitions including those from the packages

      • setStyleSheet

        public void setStyleSheet(java.io.File styleSheet)
        Set the output StyleSheet file.
        Parameters:
        styleSheet - the StyleSheet file

      • getStyleSheet

        public java.io.File getStyleSheet()
        Return the output StyleSheet file.
        Returns:
        the output StyleSheet file

      • setStyleSheetTheme

        public void setStyleSheetTheme(java.io.File styleSheetTheme)
        Set the StyleSheet theme file.
        Parameters:
        styleSheetTheme - StyleSheet theme file.

      • getStyleSheetTheme

        public java.io.File getStyleSheetTheme()
        Return the output StyleSheet theme file..
        Returns:
        the output StyleSheet theme file.

      • setupElementDefinitions

        public void setupElementDefinitions()
        Setup element definitions to be sure that we don't have more than once the same path name.

      • hasResource

        public boolean hasResource(java.lang.String id)
        Return true if the model has a resource with no package of a specified ID.
        Parameters:
        id - the ID
        Returns:
        true if the model has a resource with no package of the specified ID

      • addResource

        public void addResource(org.docgene.model.globals.ResourceDefinition resource)
        Add a resource.

        Referencing the resource URL

        Note that the resource must be defined in a "doc-files" directory. The URL is relative to this directory. For example, if we have the following file structure: 
         articles
 ==> resources.xml
 ==> doc-files
 ====> myResourceFile.xml
 ====> anotherResourceFile.html
        In that case, the "resources.xml" file can have the following content to reference both the resources: 
         <resources>
   <resourceDefinition id="resource1" url="myresourceFile.xml" />
   <resourceDefinition id="resource2" url="anotherResourceFile.html" />
 </resources>
        Note that the "doc-files" directory is not part of the resource URL specification.
        Parameters:
        resource - the resource
        See Also:
        ResourceDefinition

      • removeResource

        public boolean removeResource(org.docgene.model.globals.ResourceDefinition resource)
        Removes a resource.
        Parameters:
        resource - the resource.
        Returns:
        true if a resource was removed

      • addDirectResource

        public void addDirectResource(org.docgene.model.XMLResource resource)
        Add a resource directy specified in a "doc-files" directory.
        Parameters:
        resource - the resource.

      • hasRawArticles

        public boolean hasRawArticles()
        Return true if this model has at least one raw HTML file.
        Returns:
        true if this model has at least one raw HTML file

      • hasResource

        public boolean hasResource(java.lang.String id,
                           java.lang.String origPack,
                           java.lang.String pack)
        Return true if the model has a resource for a specified id and package.
        Parameters:
        id - the resource ID
        origPack - the origin package (ie it is the package from which the reference is emitted)
        pack - the resource package
        Returns:
        true if the model has a resource for the specified id and package

      • getResource

        public org.docgene.model.globals.ResourceDefinition getResource(java.lang.String id,
                                                                java.lang.String origPack,
                                                                java.lang.String pack)
        Return the resource of a specified id and package.
        Parameters:
        id - the resource ID
        origPack - the origin package (ie it is the package from which the reference is emitted)
        pack - the resource package
        Returns:
        the resource of the specified id and package

        public java.util.Map<java.lang.String,org.docgene.model.globals.ResourceDefinition> getResources()

        See Also:

        Return all the resources including those from the packages.

        public java.util.Iterator<org.docgene.model.Article> getArticlesIterator()
        Return an iterator on all the articles, including packages.
        Returns:
        the iterator

      • getArticles

        public java.util.Map<java.lang.String,org.docgene.model.Article> getArticles()
        Return the articles without packages.
        Returns:
        the articles without packages

      • countArticles

        public int countArticles()
        Return the count of all articles, excluding the XMLRedirect and template articles.
        Returns:
        the count of all articles, excluding the XMLRedirect and template articles

      • getArticlesPerAllNames

        public java.util.Map<java.lang.String,org.docgene.model.Article> getArticlesPerAllNames()
        Return the articles without packages. Beware that this Map may contain the same article several times: an article is present through:
        • Its description: see XMLArticle.getDescription()
        • Its description where the white spaces have been replaced by undersocre characters
        • Its ID if it has an ID attribute: see XMLArticle.getID()
        Returns:
        the articles without packages

      • getFirstArticle

        public org.docgene.model.XMLParentArticle getFirstArticle(java.lang.String refID,
                                                          boolean includePackages)
        Return the first article specified by its reference, regardless of the package in which the article is defined.
        Parameters:
        refID - the article reference ID. It can be:
        includePackages - true if the packaegs are takne into account
        Returns:
        the article

      • getFirstArticle

        public org.docgene.model.XMLParentArticle getFirstArticle(java.lang.String refID)
        Return the first article specified by its reference, regardless of the package in which the article is defined.
        Parameters:
        refID - the article reference ID. It can be:
        Returns:
        the article

      • acceptDependency

        public short acceptDependency(java.lang.String origPack,
                              java.lang.String destPack)
        Return true if dependencies betwen two packages are accepted.
        Parameters:
        origPack - the origin package
        destPack - the destination package
        Returns:
        true if dependencies betwen the two packages are accepted

      • isIncludingPackage

        public boolean isIncludingPackage(java.lang.String pack)
        Return true if a package must be included in the wiki output.
        Parameters:
        pack - the package
        Returns:
        true if the package must be included in the wiki output

      • showPackageErrors

        public boolean showPackageErrors(java.lang.String pack)
        Return true if a package must be included in the wiki output.
        Parameters:
        pack - the package
        Returns:
        true if the package must be included in the wiki output

      • isIncludingElement

        public boolean isIncludingElement(org.docgene.model.globals.PackagedElement element)
        Return true if an element must be included in the wiki output.
        Parameters:
        element - the element
        Returns:
        true if the element must be included in the wiki output

      • showElementErrors

        public boolean showElementErrors(org.docgene.model.globals.PackagedElement element)
        Return true if errors on an element must be emitted.
        Parameters:
        element - the element
        Returns:
        true if errors on an element must be emitted

      • showUnresolvedReferences

        public boolean showUnresolvedReferences(java.lang.String origPack,
                                        java.lang.String destPack)
        Return true if unresolved references between between two packages must emit an error.
        Parameters:
        origPack - the origin package
        destPack - the destination package
        Returns:
        true if unresolved references betwen the two packages must emit an error

      • showUnresolvedImages

        public boolean showUnresolvedImages(java.lang.String origPack,
                                    java.lang.String destPack)
        Return true if unresolved images between between two packages must emit an error.
        Parameters:
        origPack - the origin package
        destPack - the destination package
        Returns:
        true if unresolved images betwen the two packages must emit an error

      • showUnresolvedInfoboxes

        public boolean showUnresolvedInfoboxes(java.lang.String origPack,
                                       java.lang.String destPack)
        Return true if unresolved infoboxes between between two packages must emit an error.
        Parameters:
        origPack - the origin package
        destPack - the destination package
        Returns:
        true if unresolved infoboxes betwen the two packages must emit an error

      • getArticle

        public org.docgene.model.XMLParentArticle getArticle(org.docgene.model.ArticleRef articleRef)
        Return an article specified by its reference.
        Parameters:
        articleRef - the article reference ID.
        Returns:
        the article
        See Also:
        getArticle(java.lang.String, java.lang.String)

      • getArticle

        public org.docgene.model.XMLParentArticle getArticle(java.lang.String refID,
                                                     java.lang.String pack)
        Return an article specified by its reference.
        Parameters:
        refID - the article reference ID. It can be:
        • The article ID: see XMLArticle.getID()
        • The article description: see XMLArticle.getDescription()
        • The article description where the white spaces have been replaced by underscore characters
        pack - the article package
        Returns:
        the article

      • getArticle

        public org.docgene.model.XMLParentArticle getArticle(java.lang.String refID)
        Return an article specified by its reference. The article in this case is not in any package.
        Parameters:
        refID - the article reference ID. It can be:
        • The article ID: see XMLArticle.getID()
        • The article description: see XMLArticle.getDescription()
        • The article description where the white spaces have been replaced by underscore characters
        Returns:
        the article

      • getArticle

        public org.docgene.model.XMLParentArticle getArticle(java.lang.String refID,
                                                     java.lang.String origPack,
                                                     java.lang.String pack)
        Return an article specified by its reference.
        Parameters:
        refID - the article reference ID. It can be:
        • The article ID: see XMLArticle.getID()
        • The article description: see XMLArticle.getDescription()
        • The article description where the white spaces have been replaced by underscore characters
        origPack - the origin package (ie it is the package from which the reference is emitted)
        pack - the article package
        Returns:
        the article

      • removeArticle

        public boolean removeArticle(org.docgene.model.Article article)
        Remove an article.
        Parameters:
        article - the article.
        Returns:
        true if an article was removed

        public java.util.Collection<org.docgene.model.Article> getParsedArticles()

        Returns:
        the parsed articles

      • getRankedArticles

        public java.util.List<org.docgene.model.Article> getRankedArticles()
        Return all the articles including those from the packages, possibly takning the page ranks into accounts.
        Returns:
        all the articles including those from the packages

      • getAllArticles

        public java.util.List<org.docgene.model.Article> getAllArticles()
        Return all the articles including those from the packages.
        Returns:
        all the articles including those from the packages

      • getArticlesMap

        public java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.util.List<org.docgene.model.Article>> getArticlesMap()
        Return the Map of articles for each name, for all packages. The case where there is more than one article per name for several packages is taken into account.
        Returns:
        the Map of articles for each name, for all packages

      • getArticlesMapByRef

        public java.util.Map<org.docgene.model.ArticleRef,org.docgene.model.Article> getArticlesMapByRef()
        Return the Map of articles for each article reference, for all packages. The case where there is more than one article per name for several packages is taken into account.
        Returns:
        the Map of articles for each article reference, for all packages

      • hasArticle

        public boolean hasArticle(java.lang.String refID)
        Return true if the model contains an article with no package which can be reached through a specified reference.
        Parameters:
        refID - the article reference ID
        Returns:
        true if the model contains an article with no package which can be reached trhough a specified reference

      • hasArticleFromAnyPackage

        public boolean hasArticleFromAnyPackage(java.lang.String refID)
        Return true if the model contains an article with no package which can be reached through a specified reference, from any package.
        Parameters:
        refID - the article reference ID
        Returns:
        true if the model contains an article with no package which can be reached trhough a specified reference

      • hasTransitiveArticle

        public boolean hasTransitiveArticle(java.lang.String refID,
                                    java.lang.String origPack,
                                    java.lang.String pack)
        Return true if the model has a concrete article for a specified id and package.
        Parameters:
        refID - the article ID
        origPack - the origin package
        pack - the article package
        Returns:
        true if if the model has a concrete article forthe id and package

      • hasTransitiveArticle

        public boolean hasTransitiveArticle(java.lang.String refID,
                                    java.lang.String origPack,
                                    java.lang.String pack,
                                    boolean acceptInclude)
        Return true if the model has a concrete article for a specified id and package.
        Parameters:
        refID - the article ID
        origPack - the origin package
        pack - the article package
        acceptInclude - true if templates are accepted
        Returns:
        true if if the model has a concrete article forthe id and package

      • getTransitiveArticle

        public org.docgene.model.XMLParentArticle getTransitiveArticle(java.lang.String refID,
                                                               java.lang.String origPack,
                                                               java.lang.String pack)
        Return the concrete article for a specified id and package.
        Parameters:
        refID - the article ID
        origPack - the origin package
        pack - the article package
        Returns:
        the concrete article for the specified id and package

      • hasArticle

        public boolean hasArticle(java.lang.String refID,
                          java.lang.String origPack,
                          java.lang.String pack)
        Return true if the model contains an article which can be reached through a specified reference.
        Parameters:
        refID - the article reference ID
        origPack - the origin package (ie it is the package from which the reference is emitted)
        pack - the article package
        Returns:
        true if the model contains an article which can be reached trhough a specified reference

      • getCategories

        public org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesCategories getCategories()
        Return the categories.
        Returns:
        the categories

      • hasCategory

        the article which has been effectively added

                                 boolean resolve)

      • addArticle

        public org.docgene.model.Article addArticle(org.docgene.model.Article article,
                                            java.lang.String pack,
                                            boolean checkName,
                                            boolean resolve)
        Add an article.
        Parameters:
        article - the article
        pack - the article package
        checkName - true if the name of the article must be checked
        resolve - if the article must be included in the categories
        Returns:
        the article which has been effectively added
